Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Lorentzen Co.
Off Calendar May-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Lorentzen Co.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

James H. Ghilotti, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Helen Mitchell, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of Richard Arnold Beck, Deceased, and Clarice Martin and Richard Beck, as Wrongful Death Heirs of Richard Arnold Beck, Deceased.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Lorentzen Co.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on January 7, 2016 and served on defendant Lorentzen Co. on August 23, 2016.
Default was entered against defendant Lorentzen Co. on October 31, 2016.
Statement of Damages was served on August 23, 2016 and filed on October 31, 2016.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on April 2, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Helen Mitchell, as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of Richard Arnold Beck, Deceased, and Clarice Martin and Richard Beck, as Wrongful Death Heir of Richard Arnold Beck, Deceased, and against the Defaulted Defendant Lorentzen Co., as follows:

Economic Damages - $5,447.44.
Non-Economic Damages - $2,000,000.00.
Total - $2,005,447.44.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Sep-06-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-15-2016 Set For Trial On Oct-23-17 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 503

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Realign Defendant-Heir As Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jun-23-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF HELEN MITCHELL, CLARICE MARTIN Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Realign Defendant-Heir As Plaintiff

Appearances: Kimberly Chu of Brayton Purcell(415.898.1555)for Plaintiff Helen Mitchell et al.

No Appearance by the Defendants.

Uncontested Matter. Plaintiffs' and Petitioner's motion to realign defendant-heir Richard Beck as plaintiff is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed and filed in open court.
